about.construction: This site is under construction and will evolve with me as I progress through my projects and experiences.
about.contact: Please feel free to contact me. I would be very happy to assist you with your future projects.
about.intro: Welcome to my portfolio, a space where I centralize my projects, my CV, and various ways to get to know me.
about.passion: Loving problem-solving and enjoying learning, I naturally turned to computer science, a new field with so much to discover and evolving at a remarkable speed.
about.skills: My journey has led me to work with different programming languages and several frameworks. This diversity reflects my adaptability and quick learning, and I am confident in my ability to master your tools and technologies to become the resource you need.

aria-label.githubRepo: View the GitHub repository for the {{project}} project
aria-label.liveDemo: View the live demo for the {{project}} project

compiler.description: This project translates a subset of the C language into executable assembly code (NASM).

features.amd64_code: Generation of code compliant with AMD64 conventions
features.ast: Construction and traversal of an abstract syntax tree (AST)
features.lex_syntax: Lexical and syntactic analysis of the TPC language
features.test_coverage: Implementation of tests covering all known scenarios: success, syntax errors, semantic errors, and warnings.
features.test_report: Automated and centralized generation of test reports.

compiler.media_description: Diagram of the compiler project workflow: a .tcp file is lexically and syntactically analyzed using Flex and Bison to produce an abstract syntax tree, then converted into assembly code (.asm) by a C program.
compiler.title: Compiler

distribu_calcul.description: TCP-based distributed system for delegating and executing intensive computations across a network of machines.

features.architecture: Distributed architecture with parent/child management between machines
features.connection_handling: Handling connections, disconnections, and failures without data loss
features.distributed_execution: Distributed execution of conjectures over value ranges
features.non_blocking: Non-blocking download of JARs containing algorithms
features.results: Centralization of results into a file

distribu_calcul.title: DistribuMath

dodge_run.description: A small real-time game where the player controls a character. This mini-project demonstrates the practical use of data structures to determine the execution order of events, including the use of a priority queue to schedule events.
dodge_run.title: DodgeRun

review.description: This project allows users to submit Java code and unit tests to receive reviews from other users. The platform provides features for tracking, voting, and commenting on code and reviews.

features.collaboration: Collaboration in a team of 5 using Agile Scrum methodology
features.mvc_role: MVC architecture with role-based access control
features.secure: Secure authentication system and user data protection
features.test: Microservice for safely executing unit tests

review.media_description: Video demonstrating the use of a code review platform: a user browses a list of published code, sorts it by date, views code in detail, runs associated tests, then logs in to publish code, vote, follow other users, and add a review by reusing a previous one.
review.title: Review

videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support videos.
